scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bun --bun oxlint -c oxlint.config.ts --report-unused-disable-directives-severity=error --deny-warnings --type-aware apps/landing/astro.config.mjs apps/landing/postcss.config.mjs apps/landing/scripts apps/landing/src
